Under the current Netanyahu government Israel is suffering the biggest diplomatic collapse since 1948
Egypt doesn't control its border with Gaza. Israel does. IDF is positioned on the border from the Gaza side. Nothing and nobody can come in from Egypt without Israeli permission

במשך כמה ימים בצה"ל מנסים לטייח את התקרית החמורה בדרום הרצועה בה נהרגו אנשי הסהר האדום הפלסטיני מירי של חיילים. אחת הטענות של הצבא היתה שהאמבולנסים ורכב הכיבוי הגיעו ללא אורות מהבהבים ולכן לא זיהו אותם. עכשיו יוצא סרטון שמראה שזו טענה שקרית  https://t.co/j20B8zfiPF
בנימין נתניהו הפך הערב רשמית לעדנה קרנבל. קונספירטור על מלא בלשכת ראש הממשלה
הודעה ממחלקת העובדות: שחרור 6 חטופים בשבת זו הצעה של חמאס (!) מלפני 10 ימים. אין לה קשר לשינוי בצוות המו"מ
🚨🚨🚨Trump says that if all hostages in Gaza are not released by 12pm on Saturday, the ceasefire should be canceled and "let all hell break loose"

🚨🚨🚨BREAKING: Palestinian president Mahmoud Abbas has issued a decree on Monday revoking the payment system to families of Palestinian prisoners in Israeli prison or to families of Palestinian terrorists (AKA "Pay for Slay")

אין כמו פיטורי שר ביטחון בדיל פוליטי שכולל קומבינה בנושא גיוס החרדים כדי לאחד את העם, להכניס תחושת שליחות באנשי המילואים ולהכין את הציבור למלחמה נגד חיזבאללה שתהיה קשה פי כמה מהמלחמה בעזה
Tens of thousands of Israelis demonstrated tonight in Tel Aviv protesting the Netanyahu government's steps that delay the Gaza hostage deal (video: Amir Turkle) https://t.co/FI3d3i0KXQ

BREAKING: The head of Israel workers union the @histadruthadash decided to order a general strike on Monday to protest against the Netanyahu government and call for a hostage deal. This is an unprecedented step that hasn't happened since October 7. Last time this happened was in
🚨🚨🚨בכיר בצוות המו״מ הישראלי: ״הזהרנו בדיוק מהתרחיש הזה. אמרנו לנתניהו ולשרי הקבינט שלחטופים אין זמן ושהם בסכנת חיים. אבל כל מה שאמרנו נפל על אוזניים ערלות״

🚨The heads of the security and intelligence services have been urging Netanyahu for months to reach a deal to secure the release of the hostages. "We warned Netanyahu & the cabinet ministers about this exact scenario but they wouldn't listen," a senior Israeli official told me

A super moving moment at the DNC tonight when the parents of Hersh Goldberg-Polin who is held hostage by Hamas in Gaza started their speech. Tens of thousands of people started chanting "bring them home" https://t.co/Qtr9O0kQDE

BREAKING: President Biden, the Emir of Qatar and the President of Egypt issue a joint statement calling on Israel and Hamas for a final negotiations round on August 15 to finalize a Gaza hostage and ceasefire deal
🚨🚨BREAKING: Hamas says the head of its political bureau Ismail Haniyeh was assassinated in an Israel air strike on his house in Tehran

BREAKING: The Israeli Knesset passed a resolution opposing the two state solution. 68 members of Knesset (including Benny Gantz and his party) voted in favor. Only 9 members of Knesset voted against. This is the first time in history that the Knesset passes such a resolution

BREAKING: Netanyahu attacks the Biden administration in a new video: "I told Secretary Blinken it's inconceivable that in the past few months, the administration has been withholding weapons and ammunitions to Israel" https://t.co/uAZ7RawPz3
BREAKING: Biden told @TIME that "there is every reason for people" to draw the conclusion that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is prolonging the war for his own political self-preservation
Biden didn't lie. It is Israel's offer. Half a dozen Israeli officials, among them Netanyahu's aides, confirmed it to me

BREAKING: Ultranationalist ministers Ben Gvir and Smotrich tell Netanyahu they will leave the coalition and topple the government if the Israeli proposal for the hostage deal presented by President Biden goes through
Israeli right wing activists blocked aid trucks which were on their way to Gaza today at the Tarqumiya crossing in the West Bank https://t.co/fUd3ywuDbr

Watch: Israeli ambassador to the UN @giladerdan1 used a paper shredder to shred the UN charter on the podium of the UN general assembly ahead of a vote that will give new privileges to the Palestinians at the UN https://t.co/mWQ85c8uwK
🚨🚨🚨BREAKING: President Biden tells @ErinBurnett that if Israel invades the city of Rafah, the U.S. will stop supplying it with artillery shells, bombs for fighter jets and other offensive weapons
BREAKING: Hamas says in a statement it has accepted the Egyptian-Qatari ceasefire proposal

זה היה ערב מיוחד ומרגש שלא הייתי יכול לדמיין בחלומות הכי גדולים שלי. זה לא היה קורה בלי העורכים שלי ב-@axios שהפכו את הסיפורים שלי ליותר טובים, המקורות שלי שנתנו בי אמון, המשפחה שלי שתמכה בי ונסעה איתי לצד השני של האוקיינוס ואתם הקוראים. תודה https://t.co/koFDgNG7b7

Scoop: Biden told Netanyahu the U.S. won't support an Israeli counterattack on Iran. My story on @axios 
https://t.co/eFbLK6euKP
BREAKING: Iran launches attack against Israel using dozens of drones, four U.S. and Israeli officials told me

This is an amazing story by @talshalev1: Ahead of a possible attack from Iran Netanyahu moved over the weekend to the house of Simon Falic in Jerusalem which according to previous reports has a fortified bunker. Falic is a U.S. billionaire, a GOP donor and the owner of Duty Free
BREAKING: 322 aid trucks entered Gaza today. It is the highest daily number of aid trucks that entered the enclave since October 7, Israeli officials tell me

BREAKING: The Israeli security cabinet approved the opening of the Erez crossing with the Gaza strip for the first time since October 7 in order to allow more humanitarian aid to go in, Israeli official said

BREAKING: Blinken overturns “Pompeo Doctrine” and says Israeli settlements in the West Bank are “inconsistent with international law”. The move comes a day after Israel announces thousands of new housing units in the settlements
BREAKING: A special IDF and Shin Bet force rescued two Israeli hostages who were held by a Palestinian faction in the city of Rafah, IDF says
הטענה של נתניהו הערב שישראל התחזקה תחת הנהגתו כאשר היא נמצאת במשבר החריף בתולדותיה מעידה לא רק על ניתוק מהמציאות אלא על היעדר כל כוונה מצידו לקחת אחריות או להכות על חטא בעתיד הנראה לעין

תזכורת ממחלקת העובדות:
🚨נתניהו לא רק "ירש" את הסכמי אוסלו. הוא הרחיב אותם. חתם על הסכם וואי שנתנו לפלסטינים 13% נוספים מהגדה וכמובן על הסכם חברון
🚨נתניהו הסכים למדינה פלסטינית בנאום בר אילן ב-2009
🚨נתניהו הסכים לתכנית טראמפ שכללה מדינה פלסטינית
🚨כל השאר שכתוב היסטוריה

BREAKING: State Department spokesman Mathew Miller says it seems that the reason Hamas refused to release all the women who it held hostage was because the terror group didn't want them to tell what they went through while in captivity in Gaza

ברייקינג: אני מצטרף ל-CNN כפרשן מדיני. במקביל אמשיך בעבודתי ב-@axios וב-@WallaNews כדי להביא לכם את הסיפורים הכי מעניינים. כל הפרטים כאן:
https://t.co/6A04EwzGxN

Netanyahu said at the top of the cabinet meeting that he spoke in recent days with President Biden and asked him to intervene in order to improve the hostage deal. “And it was improved so that it will include more hostages for a lower cost. President Biden helped and I thank him"

🚨BREAKING: Biden says the U.S. is prepared to impose sanctions on Israeli settlers who are involved in attacks against Palestinians in the West Bank. 
🚨Why it matters: This is a big deal. It's the 1st time the U.S. is publicly considering individual sanctions against settlers https://t.co/O2ZxUCCKpt

BREAKING: White House's John Kirby says the U.S. has its own independent intelligence that shows Hamas and PIJ are using al-Shifa hospital and other hospitals for holding hostages and for military activities

BREAKING: Israeli minister of defense Gallant told Secretary of State Blinken during his meeting with the Israeli war cabinet today that Israel will not agree to any pause in the fighting in Gaza that doesn't include a release of hostages, two Israeli officials told me
BERAKING: Shortly after Biden meets Israeli war cabinet Israel announces it will allow the entry of humanitarian aid to Gaza from Egypt, Israeli officials say

BREAKING: Israeli Minister of Defense Lieberman in a message to Iran after tonight's clashes in Syria: "If it rains in Israel it will pour in Iran"
